text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
We're entering the homestretch! In the lead by five to six lengths is
Silence Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The rest of the racers are shifting into high gear in pursuit! Can
Silence Suzuka outrun them? They're closing in by the second!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
But Silence Suzuka puts the pedal to the metal and speeds off,
leaving the others behind!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka! It's Silence Suzuka! She crosses the finish line and
claims victoryyy!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Another great race for Silence Suzuka and her runaway style! She's
answered all of our sincerest hopes and wildest dreams!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I don't know what scenery awaits me, but I'll run towards it
regardless... together with you all!
